title: Bridge Essay: Uncovering the complex genetics of human character.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Uncovering the complex genetics of human character.**. Mol Psychiatry.. PMID: 30283034. DOI: 10.1038/s41380-018-0263-6. Human personality is 30-60% heritable according to twin and adoption studies. Hundreds of genetic variants are expected to influence its complex development, but few have been identified. We used amachine learning method for genome-wide association studies (GWAS) to uncover complex genotypic-phenotypic networks and environmental interactions.
